content.text: Hello Augment, I've identified a critical issue blocking our platform readiness validation. All validation scripts in the `/home/bizsynth/fuse-1/scripts/` directory are failing due to a Node.js module resolution conflict. The scripts use CommonJS (`require`) but are being treated as ES Modules.

task.description: Fix the module resolution issue for all platform readiness validation scripts.
steps: Rename all JavaScript validation files (e.g., `production-readiness-checklist.js`, `infrastructure-scalability-validator.js`, etc.) to use the `.cjs` extension.
This will ensure they are correctly interpreted as CommonJS modules by the Node.js runtime.
